title: Artoid Mode Grey Snowman Snowflakes Christmas Placemats Set of 4, Round 37cm Seasonal Winter Xmas Holiday Vintage Washable Table Mats
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL Made of 100% spun polyester which is soft, durable and wrinkle resistant. Perfect for protecting your dining table from food stains and scratches

BRIGHT DINING TABLE DECOR Add flair to your dining table with the colorful placemat from Artoid Mode. Perfect for everyday family use, holidays, receptions, parties and more. Impress your guests with safety and create a WOW feeling

Durable and stylish: hemmed and reinforced edges can help protect placemats from fraying.Vibrant patterns increase the charm of the placemats and bring a fresh breeze to your dining room, perfect for indoor and outdoor use
EASY TO CLEAN Machine wash and lay the placemat flat to dry. Stays the same and like new after every wash. Material: 100% polyester, no shrinkage, no gradient. Imported, Country of origin: China
DESIGNED FOR YOU Artoid Mode placemats are designed by professionals. Vibrant colors and unique pattern print offer you a creative and unique idea to decorate your home
